description: Host CPU profiling matrix targeting a Windows x86_64 build of the milady-ai/llama.cpp fork (cross-compiled from Linux via x86_64-w64-mingw32 by packages/app-core/scripts/build-llama-cpp-dflash.mjs --target windows-x64-cpu, or built natively on a Windows host). Mirrors host-cpu.json but pins iteration counts a touch lower because the harness has to drive the agent over a Wine bridge or a remote Windows runner — both add per-call latency that swamps short-prompt timings if you iterate too aggressively. KV cache types match the fork's CPU-side feature set (TBQ4 V-cache + TBQ3 V-cache; QJL1_256 K-cache is host-CPU-validated but ships disabled until the CI bench wires its model fixtures).

prompts.text: What is the capital of France?
Explain in three sentences why the sky is blue.
